src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Moved payload DTO classes from a generic 'payload' package to a more specific 'auth.payload' package to improve module cohesion.
Added OpenAPI/Swagger tag annotation to the controller to group authentication endpoints in the generated API documentation.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Added @Tag(name = "Authentication", description = "The Authentication API based on JWT") annotation

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Move the SignupRequest import to a new package location within the auth module.
Add OpenAPI 3.0 Tag annotation to group endpoints under 'Clinics' in the generated documentation.
Reorganize and clean up import statements, removing unused ones and reordering others for consistency.
Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the MessageResponse class.
Update the OpenAPI definition title to be more specific to the application.
Remove the unused Server annotation import to clean up the code.
Reorganize import statements to follow a standard ordering convention.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Moved org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration to the top of the import block.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration from the deprecated `and()`-chained DSL to the modern lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
Replace manual static resource path matchers with `PathRequest.toStaticResources()` and `PathRequest.toH2Console()` for better compatibility with Spring Boot 3.
Explicitly permit access to additional API endpoints (developers, plan, clinics) that were previously implicitly handled or missing.
Adjust authorization rules to be more specific, such as denying all requests by default and explicitly allowing authenticated users for certain pet/visit endpoints.
Change frame options from `sameOrigin` to `disable` to support H2 console and other embedded UIs in modern browsers.
Remove imports for classes deprecated or removed in Spring Security 6, such as `AuthenticationManagerBuilder` and `WebSecurity`.
Add necessary imports for the new Spring Security 6 configuration style, including `Customizer` and `AbstractHttpConfigurer`.
Remove commented-out fields, constructor assignments, and method stubs to clean up the class structure.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Removed lines containing `// private String email;`, `// this.plan = plan;`, and `// public String getEmail() { ... }`.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Replace the legacy Stream API collection pattern with the modern `List.of()` factory method for creating a single-element list.
Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the MessageResponse class.
Add OpenAPI 3.0 security requirement annotation to enforce bearer authentication for the controller endpoints.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Added '@SecurityRequirement(name = "bearerAuth")' annotation to the ConsultationController class

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Add @JsonIgnore to the isNew method to prevent it from being serialized in JSON responses.
Add OpenAPI Tag annotation to the controller class to improve API documentation structure.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: @Tag(name = "Plans", description = "API for the  management of  Princing Plans of the applications")

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Remove unused import statements to clean up the source file.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Removed imports for jakarta.validation.Valid, PricingPlan, PutMapping, RequestBody, and ResponseStatus

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update import path for MessageResponse to reflect a package restructuring from payload to auth.payload.
Enforce bearer token authentication requirement on the REST controller using Swagger annotations.
